programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: The Everly Brothers Reunion Concert
programme.desc: The 1983 London reunion features "Bye, Bye Love," "Wake Up Little Suzie," "Bird Dog" and "Cathy's Clown."

programme.title: David Gilmour - Remember That Night
programme.desc: David Gilmour - Remember That Night: Live at the Royal Albert Hall is recorded by guitarist David Gilmour where he presents live tracks from the album On an Island and some hits from his former band Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Hall & Oates - Live at The Sydney Entertainment Centre
programme.desc: Daryl Hall and John Oates wisely reunited a few years ago after a string of solo projects, & they put on the kind of show that makes it hard to believe they even considered going their separate ways. Here they are at the Sydney Entertainment Centre.

programme.title: Paul McCartney - The Space Within US
programme.desc: Paul McCartney presents this special performance of the US Tour, made in the United States, 11 weeks and 34 shows, playing great compositions of his solo career along with some Wings and Beatles songs.

programme.title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success.

programme.title: Justin Bieber - Live at Madison Square Garden
programme.desc: The film follows the pop star Justin Bieber during 10 days counting down to his performance at Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: Paramore - Live at the Roundhouse
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message
programme.desc: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message is an inspiring and entertaining program about the remarkable life of \\"The Godfather Soul\\" that features his greatest hits including "Living in America" and "I Feel Good."

programme.title: Living on Soul
programme.desc: Filmed during their three-night, sold-out residency at the historic Apollo Theater, this hybrid docu-concert film features the late great Sharon Jones, Charles Bradley and the rest of the Grammy-nominated Daptone Records family.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Audio Push and Cody talk about being newcomers and what it takes to be successful without a record label contract.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Learn why Common enjoys creating music as well as acting, and how icons Michael Jackson and Michael Jordan influenced him to dream big. Kendrick Lamar reflects on how his music comes from his Compton roots and how he wants to inspire young people.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Wale enlightens us on his passion for his career which results in many sleepness nights. T-Pain gives an insider's view of his travels and why he creates a plethora of music.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Young Jeezy separates fact from fiction gangster style. Lloyd Banks gives new insight behind his inspiration to be a rapper who performs with such unforgettable raw intensity.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Legendary Snoop Dogg talks about his songs and making music that feels and sounds good. Sexy newcomer Elle Varner opens up about her past as a singer and songwriter promoting positivity.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Ciara reveals why she likes to give die-hard fans exactly what they want in her albums and how her confidence has grown tremendously over the years. Ne-Yo provides an eye-opening interview on taking his film writing career to the next level.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Robin Thicke talks about creating music, getting out on the road performing, family life, and believing in yourself. J. Cole confesses to scheming as a young adult to get ahead to doing jail time before signing with Jay-Z.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Big Sean talks about his vision resulting in headlining amazing sold-out concerts. B.O.B. tells the story behind his celebrity name and how the music industry is a corporate business.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Nicki Minaj talks about her career from doing explosive underground mixed-tapes to Lil Wayne bringing her on to a record deal. Boy band Mindless Behavior takes the stage: these four guys reveal how traveling helps them create their music.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Soul singer Eric Benet and young Canadian dinger Melanie Fiona talk love, regret, and the inspiration for their searing music that resonates with fans all over the world.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Rapper 50 Cent shows off his Los Angeles home and fleet of exotic cars. Catch crooner Miguel, as he goes on tour and talks about his comparisons to Prince.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Trey Songz talks about his humble beginnings singing for rappers Twista and P Diddy. Waka Flocka shows the world why he is still relevant in today's world of music.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Usher, one of the most private artists in the industry, opens up about his personal life and what really happened between him and Tboz.

programme.title: Beyoncé: Fierce and Fabulous
programme.desc: The multi-platinum award winning recording artist has recently released her latest studio album, self titled Beyonce. Beyonce first captured the public's eye when she was the lead singer in Destiny's child.

programme.title: Will.I.Am: The Way I Am
programme.desc: The complete life story of songwriter, producer and entrepreneur- Will.I.Am. From “being raised in the ghetto’ to forming The Black Eyed Peas, everything Will.I.Am touches turns to gold. He has dabbled in fashion, technology, acting and business.

programme.title: James Brown: The Golden Greats
programme.desc: Experience

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An approaching storm and dramatic sky set the mood for this unique seascape. Bob Ross uses a canvas painted half black and half white.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Discover a beautiful quiet lake hidden deep in the wilderness - and just beyond a glorious snow-covered mountain! - from the magical brushes of Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross teams up with Mother Nature and paints an incredibly awesome sky hovering over fantastic, snow-covered mountains and glass-like reflections.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a breathtakingly beautiful seascape on black canvas today, complete with fierce skies, jagged cliff and raging ocean waves.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a breathtaking, misty wooded scene with tiny trickling creek that's fast and easy to recreate.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll into the quiet stillness of early daybreak with Bob Ross as he captures the essence of a sun shrouded forest on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will enchant you as he captures, on the canvas, a bright and cheery mountain scene right out of your dreams.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The versatility of Bob Ross's easy method is dramatically illustrated by this mighty tide crashing into a rock-lined shore.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Walk along an old fence into the autumn country with Bob Ross and rest under the golden branches of a majestic shade tree.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross into an evening display of glowing, magnificent setting sun. Another unique oval painting you'll have to see.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this oval painting, Bob Ross creates a wonderful scene where an old fence follows a trail to the edge of the woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: To capture the innocence of a stream-side cottage, Bob Ross creates a giant mountain standing majestically in the distance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Leisurely stroll along the beach and breaking wave with Bob Ross and experience the calm of day's end under a colorful setting sun … in an oval!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Talented guest artist Steve Ross creates clear blue skies, an almighty mountain, and a lake lined generously with trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Autumn is the threshold to winter, but still with glorious color and warmth in Bob Ross' trees, sky and buttery ground cover.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The field of snow and the little cabin yield to the bright, orange sun -- Bob Ross conveys harmony in this cold, but cozy scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grab a cold lemonade and follow along with Bob Ross as he leads you through wooded beauty into a hot summer swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy this fascinating experience of watching Bob Ross bring these deep dark woods alive; incredible magic on a partial black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the golden glow of sunrise, join Bob Ross for a refreshing look at early morning where anglers work and thrive.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll along a wonderful hustling, bubbling river with Bob Ross and enjoy the emergence of springtime blossoms on spectacular trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints the very best of nature -- stately evergreens and cool, still waters standing before a glorious brown mountain. A real beauty!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: This beautiful lake in the glen will leave you fully rested and at peace with the world; Bob Ross creates a quiet mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the warm swampy air and admire the overgrown trees with hanging Spanish moss and velvety bushes … all Bob Ross style of course!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with Bob Ross when you visit this towering ice mountain as it protects the misty falls and chilly lake in the valley.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Dana Jester creates a Bob Ross-style mountain scene with dignified foothills and evergreens, and super vibrant bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a meadow where evening breezes blow upon soft grasses and where you feel the warmth from a rustic little cabin.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In an almost watercolor appearance, Bob Ross paints this amazing secluded waterfall masterpiece with interesting tree and rock formations.
